---
title: "Acknowledgements"
author: "Dan Green"
date: 04/17/24
editor: visual
---

# Acknowledgements

The Michigan Technological University's Summer Youth Program / College of Business MTU Trading Room course was developed under the leadership of COB Dean, Dean Johnson, PhD, the Dolores and James Trethewey APMP Professor and Director of the Applied Portfolio Management Program.

Now in it's third year,...
